text: stmt = db.prepare("SELECT id FROM products WHERE sku = $1"); stmt.execute(sku)
db.execute("SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = '" + status + "'")
db.execute("SELECT name FROM items WHERE category = '%s'" % category)
cursor.execute("SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = %s AND user_id = %s", (status, uid))
cursor.execute("UPDATE users SET name = '" + new_name + "' WHERE id = '" + uid + "'")
cursor.execute("UPDATE users SET email = ? WHERE id = ?", (email, uid))
db.execute("UPDATE orders SET status = ? WHERE id = ?", (new_status, order_id))
